metadata.message: Saved me two hours on the deployment pipeline issue. Knew exactly where to look.

Raj, I want to call out something I should have said sooner — you've been holding the line on the API refactor while picking up the observability dashboard and CI/CD work without missing a beat. That kind of reliability is what keeps this team moving. Thank you.
Mike has been incredibly patient walking me through the K8s cluster setup. I feel like I learned more in one pairing session than a week of docs.
Mike, shipping the K8s consolidation was a massive lift. Three production clusters, zero downtime migration. The whole platform team benefits from this work. Well done.
Ana's design system components saved the customer portal team at least a sprint of work. Everything just plugs in.
Maria, you handled the Saturday rush with a short crew and still hit every prep target. The weekend team runs because of you. Thank you. — Carlos
Derek's Go knowledge saved us from a nasty concurrency bug in the deployment tooling. Great catch.
Derek, your growth over the past few months has been remarkable. From pairing on everything to submitting your first solo PR — and a clean one at that. Keep it up.

metadata._note: Alex Rivera hasn't started benefits enrollment — day 11

metadata.feedback: Good communication. Explained gap year thoughtfully.
Weak interaction design. Missed edge cases.
Excellent coding skills. Strong Go and infrastructure knowledge.
Good initial conversation. Strong sales background.

metadata._note: IT hasn't confirmed laptop request. Request submitted Feb 4, follow-up sent Feb 5, will escalate if unconfirmed by Feb 14.
Sam Kim's previous buddy assignment. Scored 9/10 NPS.

metadata.adjustments: On leave Feb 3-10; PTO used, no deduction

metadata.scope: Customer portal redesign — UX/UI design support. Filling gap while Chris Wong candidacy is in progress.
IT infrastructure migration — server rack relocation and network upgrades for Austin HQ expansion.
Recruiting support — engineering and support hiring pipeline. 8 open reqs.
SOC 2 Type II audit preparation — security controls assessment and remediation.
